message:
fix(service): prevent stale DNS resolution from clobbering newer state

DnsServiceDiscovery::poll_discover() previously had a TOCTOU race:
after releasing the lock to perform DNS resolution, a concurrent
poll could start a newer resolution. When the stale resolution
completed, it would overwrite the fresher discovery state.

The fix adds a monotonic resolve_generation counter:
- Incremented under lock before each resolution attempt
- Checked after resolution: if the generation has advanced (another
  poll started while we were resolving), the stale result is discarded

New test: dns_discovery_stale_concurrent_resolution_cannot_clobber_newer_state
uses a blocking resolver to simulate the race condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
